CustomField.description: Calculated based on the "Meets Max & Min Income Limit" fields, Waiver fields, and Special Consideration field. If "Yes", any conditions will be specified. Priority: Special Considerations, Ownership Waiver, Over Inc (Mod), Max Inc Limit, Min Inc Limit.
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(Meets_Max_Income_Limit__c = "No", Meets_Min_Income_Limit__c = "No"), "ERROR",
IF(TEXT(IAW_Special_Consideration__c) = "Yes", "Yes (Special Consideration)",
IF(TEXT(IAW_Ownership_Waiver__c) = "Yes", "Yes (Waiver)",
IF(HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c > Moderate_Income_Limit__c, "No (Over Income)",
IF(Meets_Max_Income_Limit__c = "No", "No (Over Max Income)",
IF(Meets_Min_Income_Limit__c = "No", "No (Under Min Income)",
IF(Meets_Min_Income_Limit__c = "Yes (Waiver)", "Yes (Waiver)",
IF(Meets_Min_Income_Limit__c = "Yes", "Yes",
"ERROR"))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated based on the "Meets Max & Min Income Limit" fields, Waiver fields, and Special Consideration field. If "Yes", any conditions will be specified. Priority: Special Considerations, Ownership Waiver, Over Inc (Mod), Max Inc Limit, Min Inc Limit.
CustomField.label: Income Eligible?
